'''lawata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khanji|khanji]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khanji|khanji]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lawata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læwætæth|læwætæth]] || [[word:læwætæj|læwætæj]] || [[word:læwætæsh|læwætæsh]] || [[word:læwætæ|læwætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawawatath|lawawatath]] || [[word:lawawataj|lawawataj]] || [[word:lawawatash|lawawatash]] || [[word:lawawata|lawawata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawatath|lawatath]] || [[word:lawataj|lawataj]] || [[word:lawatash|lawatash]] || [[word:lawata|lawata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawaftath|lawaftath]] || [[word:lawaftaj|lawaftaj]] || [[word:lawaftash|lawaftash]] || [[word:lawaftaf|lawaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawatatha|lawatatha]] || [[word:lawataja|lawataja]] || [[word:lawatasha|lawatasha]] || [[word:lawataka|lawataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawatath|lawatath]] || [[word:lawataj|lawataj]] || [[word:lawatash|lawatash]] || [[word:lawata|lawata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawatathal|lawatathal]] || [[word:lawatajal|lawatajal]] || [[word:lawatashal|lawatashal]] || [[word:lawatakal|lawatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawatathatha|lawatathatha]] || [[word:lawatajaja|lawatajaja]] || [[word:lawatashasha|lawatashasha]] || [[word:lawataka|lawataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawatathan|lawatathan]] || [[word:lawatajan|lawatajan]] || [[word:lawatashan|lawatashan]] || [[word:lawatakan|lawatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawatathaoro|lawatathaoro]] || [[word:lawatajaoro|lawatajaoro]] || [[word:lawatashaoro|lawatashaoro]] || [[word:lawatakaoro|lawatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
